props.name: fullMenuBreakpoint
props.description: Sets the breakpoint in px for the full menu to display.

props.name: heading
props.description: Set the service name to display in the app header.

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area.

props.name: secondaryText
props.description: V2 only: Secondary text displayed under the service name.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: url
props.description: Set the URL to link from the alberta.ca logo. A full url is required.

events.name: onMenuClick
events.description: Callback fired when the menu button is clicked. When provided, clicking the menu button dispatches a custom event instead of toggling the menu.
